name: Dietary Protein Restriction
summary: Lifestyle lever that can reduce GHR/IGF-1 activity, with epidemiologic and animal-tumor evidence suggesting strong age-dependent tradeoffs.
mechanism_summary: Reduces dietary amino-acid input into GH/IGF-1 and nutrient-sensing biology, but older adults may need higher protein to preserve muscle and resilience.

open_questions: Whether protein restriction can be made safe for older adults without worsening sarcopenia or frailty
Whether IGF-1 lowering is causal for the human mortality association
Which protein sources and life stages matter most
